entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: The old world bollworm, a polyphagous agricultural pest with global distribution.

entities.name: ARIMAX
entities.description: Auto Regressive Integrated Moving Average with Explanatory variable, a forecasting model used to predict pest trends.

entities.name: NNARX
entities.description: Neural Network Autoregressive models with Exogeneous inputs, a forecasting model used to predict pest trends.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The geographic region where the study on Helicoverpa armigera was conducted.

entities.name: WEATHER PARAMETERS
entities.description: Exogeneous variables used as inputs for the ARIMAX and NNARX forecasting models.

entities.name: MAXIMUM TEMPERATURE
entities.description: A specific weather parameter used as an external variable in the best-fit ARIMAX model.

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: A specific weather parameter used as an external variable in the best-fit ARIMAX model.

entities.name: PHEROMONE TRAP CATCH
entities.description: A method used to collect historical data on the pod borer population for model fitting.

entities.name: INSECTICIDES
entities.description: Chemical agents used by farmers to control the damage caused by H. armigera.

entities.name: POD BORER POPULATION
entities.description: The population of Helicoverpa armigera being predicted via pheromone trap catches.
